description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a dark gray exterior and white trim, complemented by a spacious wraparound porch and a large driveway leading to a double garage. The rear of the house opens onto a deck area with outdoor seating and a prominent above-ground octagonal pool with wooden steps. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The roof is flat and minimally sloped, giving the structure a modern, streamlined appearance. The property includes both paved and landscaped areas, with visible outdoor furniture and a grill on the deck. The overall design emphasizes open, accessible living with strong indoor-outdoor connectivity.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gray exterior, white trim, wraparound porch, double garage, and an above-ground pool in the backyard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the octagonal above-ground pool, deck area, and large windows along the gray facade.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the double garage, main entrance, and expansive driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the wraparound porch, outdoor seating, and access to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the pool, deck, and additional windows, with a clear look at the porch and grill area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
